Chunk 83bab7ae defines tree edges, back edges, and mentions forward/cross edges. Chunk adcffc8e provides the complete legend with all four types and their exact definitions matching the ground truth.
evidence: Tree edge: the edge whereby from a vertex visits a new vertex
Back edge: going from descendants to ancestors
Forward edge: going from ancestor to descendant
Cross edge: edge connecting 2 non-related vertices
